style_summary: A high-impact anime web-thumbnail system with oversized reaction characters, bold yellow headline typography, hard black shadows, split-screen framing, a smaller glowing action insert, and clean cel-shaded illustration.

environment_variables.SUBJECT: main adult anime subject or paired reaction subjects
environment_variables.SUBJECT_ACTION: surprised, amazed, competitive, or discovery-driven action
environment_variables.PRODUCT_OR_PROP: object, product, tool, device, food, game cabinet, package, plant, or other prop
environment_variables.LOCATION: clean indoor or semi-technical setting with simple background planes
environment_variables.BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS: windows, panels, cabinets, screens, glow clouds, motion puffs, framed partitions, or soft blue depth elements
environment_variables.SECONDARY_TEXT: optional small callout or repeated supporting label
environment_variables.ACCENT_SYMBOL: small yellow arrow, burst, glow puff, or outlined callout marker
environment_variables.WARDROBE_STYLE: bright modern anime wardrobe, fully clothed, non-sexual, readable silhouette
environment_variables.STYLE_FIDELITY_ANCHORS: dense anime thumbnail, giant yellow-black headline, large cropped reaction characters, smaller central glowing reveal, crisp cel shading, blue/cyan background, warm accents, strong black outlines, high-contrast social thumbnail
environment_variables.SOURCE_CONTENT_TO_AVOID: source characters, shower or bathroom setup, towel or exposed-body reveal, exact source headline, exact poses, sexualized framing, watermark, platform UI, logo, or original story premise
environment_variables.NEGATIVE_PROMPT: negative prompt constraints copied from the top-level negative_prompt field

style_fidelity_anchors: Preserve the core visual identity: A high-impact anime web-thumbnail system with oversized reaction characters, bold yellow headline typography, hard black shadows, split-screen framing, a smaller glowing action insert, and clean cel-shaded illustration.
Use clean glossy cel-shaded anime rendering, crisp black line art, smooth gradients, and bright commercial lighting.
Use cool blue/cyan backgrounds, warm character colors, high-contrast black outlines, and a small yellow arrow or glow marker.
Use new subjects, new scene details, new props or products, and new text, while preserving the style fidelity anchors.
Keep the same visual genre, density level, and rendering mode across new subjects.
Preserve the original balance between main subject, typography, decorative marks, and background texture.
Use the variables to change content while keeping the style system stable.

visual_deconstruction.style_category: A high-impact anime web-thumbnail system with oversized reaction characters, bold yellow headline typography, hard black shadows, split-screen framing, a smaller glowing action insert, and clean cel-shaded illustration.
visual_deconstruction.composition_logic: A reusable poster/image system where the subject, prop, location, text, and accent variables change while the layout grammar remains fixed.
visual_deconstruction.subject_treatment: The subject is driven by SUBJECT and SUBJECT_ACTION, with wardrobe or visual treatment supplied by WARDROBE_STYLE.
visual_deconstruction.background_system: LOCATION and BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS provide the scene, texture, spatial cues, and secondary details without changing the style family.
visual_deconstruction.type_and_graphics: MAIN_TEXT, SECONDARY_TEXT, and ACCENT_SYMBOL control readable text, microcopy, stickers, marks, arrows, bursts, or other graphic accents.
visual_deconstruction.content_boundary: The negative prompt and source_content_to_avoid list prevent direct recreation of source subjects, marks, brands, watermarks, and story premises.

image_treatment.finish: finished AI-image prompt output, not a wireframe, SVG, HTML mockup, or raw storyboard note
image_treatment.texture: preserve the material, paper, grain, marker, photographic, or print texture described by the style summary and prompt_template
image_treatment.lighting: keep the lighting behavior implied by the reference style rather than replacing it with a generic cinematic look

composition.layout: Keep the subject hierarchy, crop behavior, framing, and density described by the prompt_template.
composition.subject: Use SUBJECT and SUBJECT_ACTION as the primary visual anchor, scaled and positioned according to the style identity.
composition.scene: Use LOCATION and BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS for setting detail without changing the visual genre.
composition.text: Place MAIN_TEXT and SECONDARY_TEXT as designed graphic elements, not as long paragraphs.

typography.main_text: MAIN_TEXT should be short, legible, and visually integrated with the poster or image system.
typography.secondary_text: SECONDARY_TEXT should read as small caption, label, route note, slogan, or microcopy.
typography.style: Match the typography behavior described by the style summary and prompt_template, including scale, distortion, texture, and placement.

color_palette.palette_behavior: Use the dominant colors, contrast rhythm, and accent-color logic implied by the style summary.
color_palette.background: Keep the background color family consistent with the reference style.
color_palette.accents: Use ACCENT_SYMBOL and graphic marks to carry small high-contrast color moments.

design_rules: Use clean glossy cel-shaded anime rendering, crisp black line art, smooth gradients, and bright commercial lighting.
Put a huge uppercase yellow headline with thick black outline and hard drop shadow near the top.
Use cool blue/cyan backgrounds, warm character colors, high-contrast black outlines, and a small yellow arrow or glow marker.
Keep the scene fully clothed and non-sexual.
Change the source subject, location, prop, action, text, and story premise.
Avoid the negative_prompt items; match the reference style first, then change the source content.
Use new subjects, new scene details, new props or products, and new text, while preserving the style fidelity anchors.
do: Replace subjects, props, locations, text, and story details through examples.values.
Keep prompt_template placeholders declared in environment_variables.
Preserve the style_fidelity_anchors when adapting the JSON to a new image request.
Use short, readable text values for MAIN_TEXT and SECONDARY_TEXT.
negative_prompt: source characters, shower scene, bathroom, towels, exposed-body reveal, sexualized anatomy, cleavage focus, underwear focus, exact source headline, watermark, username, QR code, logo, platform UI, realistic photo, 3D render, painterly concept art, low contrast text, small unreadable typography, dark moody palette, horror gore, explicit content, minors

values.SUBJECT: two adult anime food creators reacting to a glowing ramen automaton
values.SUBJECT_ACTION: one chef gasps with chopsticks raised while a rival critic smirks in disbelief
values.PRODUCT_OR_PROP: a compact ramen-making machine releasing turquoise steam and floating noodles
values.LOCATION: clean late-night ramen counter with blue window panels and warm cabinets
values.BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS: simple glass partitions, cyan glow, soft steam puffs, and a small yellow arrow pointing at the machine
values.WARDROBE_STYLE: fully clothed modern chef jacket and sporty streetwear, non-sexual, readable silhouettes

values.SUBJECT: two adult anime arcade champions reacting to a glowing retro cabinet portal
values.SUBJECT_ACTION: one player points at the cabinet in shock while the other grins confidently and clutches a token card
values.PRODUCT_OR_PROP: neon arcade cabinet opening a cyan portal with pixel sparks
values.LOCATION: clean futuristic arcade hallway with glass panels and blue wall lights
values.BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS: vertical machine silhouettes, soft glow puffs, simple floor reflections, and a small yellow arrow pointing to the portal
values.ACCENT_SYMBOL: small yellow arrow and cyan burst
values.WARDROBE_STYLE: fully clothed colorful jackets, gloves, and headphones, non-sexual

values.SUBJECT: two adult anime space couriers reacting to a hovering delivery drone
values.SUBJECT_ACTION: one courier stares wide-eyed while the other laughs and raises a scanner
values.PRODUCT_OR_PROP: a compact anti-gravity parcel drone with blue thrusters and a sealed package
values.LOCATION: bright orbital loading bay with window panels and clean storage cabinets
values.BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS: cyan glow clouds, simplified space view through glass, panel doors, and a yellow arrow pointing at the drone
values.WARDROBE_STYLE: fully clothed courier flight jackets and utility belts, non-sexual, readable silhouettes

values.SUBJECT: two adult anime greenhouse engineers reacting to a tiny plant mecha
values.SUBJECT_ACTION: one botanist blushes with excited surprise while a mechanic smiles and presses a remote
values.PRODUCT_OR_PROP: miniature walking planter robot sprouting a luminous blue flower
values.LOCATION: clean glass greenhouse lab with cabinets, sliding doors, and sky-blue windows
values.BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS: soft cyan light, leaf silhouettes, simple lab panels, and a yellow arrow pointing at the robot flower
values.ACCENT_SYMBOL: small yellow arrow and glow puff
values.WARDROBE_STYLE: fully clothed lab apron, mechanic jacket, gloves, and practical workwear, non-sexual
